nodes.name: Daily 22:00
nodes.notes: Fires once a day at 22:00 per docs/00 §8.7. The workflow then reads the day's real pain signals, replies, and objections and extracts content opportunities. No customer-facing action is taken; output is review-only.

nodes.name: Generate Content Opportunities
nodes.notes: Local script only (no network beyond the configured AI provider). Reads the day's Pain Signal / Evidence Text (Lead Pool) and Message Content / Intent / Urgency (Conversation Log), runs the content-opportunity-extractor-v1 prompt, and prints a JSON object shaped {"opportunities":[{pain_point,topic,search_intent,recommended_format[],draft_brief,priority,source_lead_id,source_conversation_id}]}. Validates the schema; on invalid JSON or missing required fields it exits non-zero so the second (error) output fires. $env supplies AI keys and table ids at runtime; the script must never publish or post anything itself.

nodes.name: Parse Opportunities
nodes.notes: Captures the script's stdout as a single string for the Split node to itemize. Empty stdout defaults to '{}' so the next step produces zero items instead of erroring.

nodes.name: Split Opportunities
nodes.notes: One item per opportunity so each is written as its own Content Opportunity row. Reads the 'opportunities' array parsed from the script JSON.

nodes.name: Create Content Opportunity

parameters.fields: ={{JSON.stringify({"Content ID":"","Source Lead ID":$json.source_lead_id || "","Source Conversation ID":$json.source_conversation_id || "","Pain Point":$json.pain_point || "","Topic":$json.topic || "","Search Intent":$json.search_intent || "","Recommended Format":Array.isArray($json.recommended_format) ? $json.recommended_format : [],"Draft Brief":$json.draft_brief || "","Priority":$json.priority || "Low","Status":"New","Owner":""})}}

nodes.notes: Writes one Content Opportunity row per item. Field names match docs/02 Content Opportunity EXACTLY: Content ID, Source Lead ID, Source Conversation ID, Pain Point, Topic, Search Intent, Recommended Format (array -> multi-select), Draft Brief, Priority, Status, Owner. Source Lead ID and Source Conversation ID are preserved from the script output so every idea traces back to a real lead/conversation (docs/06 rule: never invent a customer case). Status defaults to New (docs/02 Content Opportunity Status options: New/Drafted/Reviewed/Published); nothing is published automatically. appToken/tableId come from $env only; Content ID/Owner are left blank for the script/operator to fill.

nodes.name: Error / Invalid Opportunities
nodes.notes: Reached only when Generate Content Opportunities exits non-zero (invalid AI JSON, schema violation, or missing script). Emits a structured error record with the stage name and timestamp. No Content Opportunity rows are written on this path.

meta.asg_boundary: extract content ideas from real daily pain points only; source lead/conversation IDs are preserved; no automatic public posting, no invented customer cases. Credentials and table ids come from $env. Daily 22:00 schedule per docs/00 §8.7.
